name: vscode-powerquery-client
description: VS Code part of language server
author: Microsoft Corporation

scripts.link:start: npm link && npm uninstall @microsoft/powerquery-parser @microsoft/powerquery-language-services && npm install && npm link @microsoft/powerquery-parser @microsoft/powerquery-language-services
scripts.link:stop: npm unlink @microsoft/powerquery-parser @microsoft/powerquery-language-services && npm install && npm install @microsoft/powerquery-parser@latest @microsoft/powerquery-language-services@latest --save-exact
